name: Chocolate Date Picnic Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 0:35
Heat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour the bottom only of an 8-inch square pan.
In a large bowl, combine dates, baking soda, and boiling water; stir until well combined. Allow to cool for 5 minutes.
Spoon flour into a measuring cup, lightly tapping it to level off. Add flour and remaining cake ingredients (except chips) to the dry mix; blend at low speed until well combined.
Beat on medium speed for an additional 2 minutes. Stir in half the chocolate chips.
Pour batter evenly into the prepared pan.
Sprinkle topping ingredients evenly over the batter.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
Serve warm or at room temperature; top with whipped cream if desired.
